prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M30B35** (3.5L inline-6) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Pauter rods, ARP head studs) and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft profile for high-RPM power delivery, paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbo** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) running 22 psi on E85 fuel with a **Motec M150 ECU** for precise boost control and ignition mapping.

Full **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Supersprint** with 200-cell catalytic converters and a **Bosal 76mm center muffler** for optimized backpressure, coupled with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port blow-off valve** to prevent compressor surge under aggressive shifts.

Custom **Bilstein Clubsport coilovers** (2-way adjustable damping, 80mm front/70mm rear drop) with **Eibach ERS race springs** (12kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and **Meyle HD thrust arms** to eliminate front subframe flex, paired with a **H&R 25mm rear sway bar** and **Powerflex poly bushings** (PFB9-411) for razor-sharp turn-in.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Pandem Design) with custom carbon fiber fenders (2.5-inch flares) and **OEM-style rivet installation**, paired with a **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** (Xpel Stealth finish) for a stealth OEM+ look.

**BMW 2002 Turbo-style front lip** (custom fiberglass, 3-inch overhang) with **Hella Rallye 1000 driving lights** (clear lenses, Cibié bulbs) and a **custom aluminum radiator support** (replacing the stock steel unit) to reduce front-end weight by 8 lbs.

**BBS RS-GT 16x9 ET15 wheels** (gold centers, polished lips) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (245/40/16 front, 265/40/16 rear), paired with **OMP 330mm suede steering wheel** (MOMO quick-release hub) and **Recaro SRD Evo seats** (fixed-back, Schroth 6-point harnesses).
